subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sacrificed thy life in the exaltation of the Word of God, and hast offered thy spirit in the diffusion of the divine fragrances! Some time ago [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من فدا حیاته فی اعلاء کلمه الله و بذل روحه فی نشر نفحات الله مدتی پیش مختصر
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @review of publications, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
